features.featureTitle: Add a Calculator page to the frontend with a fully functional standard calculator supporting addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. The calculator should display a multi-digit input/result screen and a grid of buttons for digits 0–9, decimal point, arithmetic operators (+, −, ×, ÷), equals, clear (C), and sign toggle (+/−) and percentage (%) if applicable. Handle edge cases such as division by zero gracefully.
